meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve slow development speed (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Project Management to Solve Slow Dev Speed
content.seo_description: Stop grinding and start scaling. Learn how to use project management with Antigravity and Claude Code to eliminate slow development speed in your freelance business.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development speed, shift from manual coding to an AI-orchestrated project management workflow. By integrating Antigravity for structural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative execution, you treat your codebase as a managed product. This approach reduces context switching, automates boilerplate, and accelerates delivery cycles by up to 400%.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank terminal at 2 AM, the client’s deadline looming, and the codebase feels like a tangled web of technical debt. We've all been there: the 'Freelancer’s Trap' where your hourly rate drops as your development velocity stalls. The problem isn't your skill; it's your process. When you manually manage every line of code, you aren't an engineer—you're a bottleneck.

The shift happens when you stop writing code and start managing systems. By leveraging Antigravity for architectural blueprints and Claude Code for high-bandwidth implementation, you transform your workflow from a manual grind into a high-octane delivery machine. It’s time to stop coding like it’s 2015 and start shipping like a senior architect.

steps.title: Architectural Blueprinting
steps.description: Define the project constraints and technical stack to ensure AI alignment before a single file is created.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the requirements for a high-performance SaaS MVP. Create a modular directory structure using clean architecture principles, ensuring separation of concerns for API, DB, and UI layers.

steps.title: Automated Scaffolding
steps.description: Generate the boilerplate code based on the architectural plan to eliminate repetitive setup tasks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the core boilerplate for the identified modules. Use TypeScript, Next.js 14, and Prisma ORM. Ensure type safety across all generated interfaces.

steps.title: Context-Aware Iteration
steps.description: Feed specific feature requirements into the CLI to generate functional code blocks that adhere to your project standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the user authentication flow including JWT handling and social login providers. Follow standard security best practices.

steps.title: Automated Code Review
steps.description: Use AI agents to perform static analysis and refactoring before committing to the main branch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for performance bottlenecks and unnecessary re-renders. Refactor the API route handlers for optimal latency.

steps.title: Systematic Documentation
steps.description: Generate technical documentation automatically to ensure project maintainability for future client handovers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive README and internal technical documentation based on the current codebase state and API endpoints.

pro_tips: Treat your prompts like unit tests; if the AI output fails, refine the prompt context rather than fixing the code manually.
Use a dedicated '.ai-context' file in your root directory to store global coding standards that Claude Code will reference automatically.
Chain your commands: use Antigravity to plan the feature, then pipe the output directly into Claude Code for implementation to maintain consistency.
Always perform a 'dry-run' via Claude Code to preview changes before applying them to your production branch.
Keep your project management board synced with your commits; use the AI to generate commit messages based on task completion status.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project folder. Identify the most repetitive task you performed this week and use the steps above to build a reusable prompt template for it.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting slow development speed dictate your income. Leverage the power of AI-orchestrated project management to reclaim your time and scale your freelance agency. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
